content.problemStatement:
Given is a tree with NNN weighted vertices and N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 weighted edges. The iii-th vertex has a weight of AiA_iAi‚Äč. The iii-th edge has a weight of WiW_iWi‚Äč and connects vertices uiu_iui‚Äč and viv_ivi‚Äč.

Let dist‚Ā°(x,y)\operatorname{dist}(x,y)dist(x,y) be the sum of weights of the edges in the unique simple path connecting vertices xxx and yyy.

Let V‚Ā°(x,y)\operatorname{V}(x,y)V(x,y) be the set of vertices appearing in the unique simple path connecting vertices xxx and yyy (including xxx and yyy).

You are asked QQQ queries. In the iii-th query, you are given two integers xix_ixi‚Äč and yiy_iyi‚Äč and you need to compute:

‚ąĎk‚ąąV‚Ā°(xi,yi)(dist‚Ā°(xi,k)‚ąídist‚Ā°(k,yi))‚čÖAk\sum\limits_{k\in \operatorname{V}(x_i,y_i)}\left(\operatorname{dist}(x_i,k)-\operatorname{dist}(k,y_i)\right)\cdot A_kk‚ąąV(xi‚Äč,yi‚Äč)‚ąĎ‚Äč(dist(xi‚Äč,k)‚ąídist(k,yi‚Äč))‚čÖAk‚Äč


Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line contains two integers NNN and QQQ.
The second line contains NNN integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1,A_2,\dots,A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.
Each of the next N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 lines contains three integers uiu_iui‚Äč, viv_ivi‚Äč and WiW_iWi‚Äč.
Each of the next QQQ lines contains two integers xix_ixi‚Äč and yiy_iyi‚Äč.


Output Format
For each query, print the answer to it on a new line.
constraints: The sum of NNN across all test cases does not exceed 2‚čÖ1052\cdot 10^52‚čÖ105.
The sum of QQQ across all test cases does not exceed 2‚čÖ1052\cdot 10^52‚čÖ105.
